name: DoIP_SetEntityStatusInformation
title: DoIP_SetEntityStatusInformation
description: Configures the response sent for an entity status request.

parameters.name: nodeType
parameters.description: -1: do not send a response for the request (default) 0: gateway 1: node others: reserved

parameters.name: maxRequestSize
parameters.description: 0: do not send this optional parameter in a response 0xFFFFFFFF: send a value that is supported by this implementation. Currently 16777216 is sent (i.e. 16 MiB) other: value sent in the response

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
